#!/bin/bash

# OpenClaw 多实例启动脚本 - 使用 --profile 方式
# 架构B: 4个独立实例

OPENCLAW_PATH="/root/.npm-global/bin/openclaw"

# 颜色输出
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

log() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')]${NC} $1"
}

log_warn() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')]${NC} $1"
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')]${NC} $1"
}

# 停止所有实例
stop_all() {
    log "停止所有 OpenClaw 实例..."
    for PROFILE in mimi tuitui xiaoxiao anan; do
        log "停止实例: $PROFILE"
        XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/0 "$OPENCLAW_PATH" --profile "$PROFILE" gateway stop 2>/dev/null || true
    done
    pkill -f "openclaw.*--profile" 2>/dev/null || true
    sleep 2
}

# 启动单个实例
start_instance() {
    local PROFILE=$1
    local PORT=$2
    local CONFIG_FILE="/root/openclaw-instances/$PROFILE/openclaw.json"

    log "启动实例: $PROFILE (端口: $PORT)..."

    # 设置环境变量
    export OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH="$CONFIG_FILE"

    # 使用 profile 启动 gateway
    cd /root
    nohup "$OPENCLAW_PATH" --profile "$PROFILE" gateway > "/root/openclaw-instances/$PROFILE.log" 2>&1 &
    INSTANCE_PID=$!

    echo $INSTANCE_PID > "/root/openclaw-instances/$PROFILE.pid"
    log "实例 $PROFILE 已启动, PID: $INSTANCE_PID"
    sleep 3
}

# 检查状态
check_status() {
    log "检查进程状态..."

    for PROFILE in mimi tuitui xiaoxiao anan; do
        PID_FILE="/root/openclaw-instances/$PROFILE.pid"
        if [ -f "$PID_FILE" ]; then
            PID=$(cat "$PID_FILE" 2>/dev/null)
            if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
                log "实例 $PROFILE (PID: $PID) - 运行中"
            else
                log_error "实例 $PROFILE - 已停止"
            fi
        else
            log_warn "实例 $PROFILE - 无 PID 文件"
        fi
    done

    log "检查端口监听..."
    netstat -tulpn 2>/dev/null | grep -E "18790|18791|18792|18793" || ss -tulpn 2>/dev/null | grep -E "18790|18791|18792|18793" || log_warn "无法检查端口"
}

# 安装为服务
install_services() {
    log "安装系统服务..."

    declare -A PORTS=(
        ["mimi"]=18790
        ["tuitui"]=18791
        ["xiaoxiao"]=18792
        ["anan"]=18793
    )

    for PROFILE in mimi tuitui xiaoxiao anan; do
        PORT=${PORTS[$PROFILE]}
        CONFIG_FILE="/root/openclaw-instances/$PROFILE/openclaw.json"

        log "安装服务: openclaw-$PROFILE"

        # 创建 profile 的配置目录
        mkdir -p "/root/.openclaw-$PROFILE"

        # 复制配置到 profile 位置
        cp "$CONFIG_FILE" "/root/.openclaw-$PROFILE/openclaw.json"

        # 设置环境变量并安装服务
        export OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH="$CONFIG_FILE"
        cd /root
        "$OPENCLAW_PATH" --profile "$PROFILE" gateway install --port "$PORT" --bind lan
    done
}

# 主函数
case "${1:-start}" in
    start)
        stop_all
        start_instance mimi 18790
        start_instance tuitui 18791
        start_instance xiaoxiao 18792
        start_instance anan 18793
        log "所有实例启动完成!"
        sleep 2
        check_status
        ;;
    stop)
        stop_all
        log "所有实例已停止"
        ;;
    status)
        check_status
        ;;
    restart)
        $0 stop
        sleep 2
        $0 start
        ;;
    install)
        install_services
        ;;
